{{Quote|Dressed in a spacer's coverall, he looks like a dirt-brown snake with clawed legs and arms and a large anvil-shaped head.|[[Doikk Na'ts/Legends|Doikk Na'ts]]|<ref name="We Don't Do Weddings: The Band's Tale">{{StoryCite|story=We Don't Do Weddings: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
'''Kodu Terrafin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] who worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].

==Biography==
He lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and was an employee of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Kodu operated a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] transport service and shuttled the [[Jizz/Legends|Jizz]] band known as the [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Modal Nodes]] to the [[Star Chamber Café]] at the [[Lucky Despot]] Hotel where they were expected to perform at the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] [[Wedding of Valarian and D'Wopp|wedding]] of Lady [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]] and [[D'Wopp]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=We Don't Do Weddings: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{1st}}
